props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the radio group will be announced by screen readers.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all radio items in the group.

props.name: error
props.description: Shows an error state on all radio items in the group.

props.name: id
props.description: The identifier for the radio group element.

props.name: name
props.description: The name for the radio group. Used for accessibility and change events.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Sets the layout direction. 'vertical' stacks items, 'horizontal' places them in a row.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of all radio items. 'compact' reduces spacing for dense layouts.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: The currently selected value in the radio group.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the selected radio item changes.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the radio group will be announced by screen readers.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Sets the disabled state for the control.

props.name: error
props.description: Sets the error state for the control.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the id attribute of the underlying web component.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: name
props.description: The name for the radio group. Used for accessibility and change events.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Sets the layout direction. 'vertical' stacks items, 'horizontal' places them in a row.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of all radio items. 'compact' reduces spacing for dense layouts (V2 only).

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets the data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: The currently selected value in the radio group.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Emits when the selected radio item changes. Emits the name, value, and event of the selected item.

props.description: The name for the radio group. Used for accessibility and change events.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Sets the layout direction. 'vertical' stacks items, 'horizontal' places them in a row.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of all radio items. 'compact' reduces spacing for dense layouts (V2 only).

props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: version
props.description: Design system version for styling.

events.name: _change
events.type: CustomEvent<{ name: string; value: string; label: string }>
